bullets.text: Hezbollah has rejected a renewed ceasefire agreement between Israel and Lebanon, which the United States announced on Wednesday night after a new round of talks.

Experts are criticizing a plan to establish an American-only Ebola quarantine center in Kenya, arguing it deviates from established policy of treating CDC staff in the US and supporting all health workers.

Clashes have erupted in Mogadishu between Somali troops and opposition-allied militias, causing civilians to flee, ahead of protests planned over the president's decision to remain in office past his term.
The mother of Kumanjayi Little Baby was living in insecure housing in Alice Springs to access specialist support for her daughter, highlighting a lack of services.
Politicians are hesitant to express whether house prices should rise or fall, as they face pressure from both homeowners and potential buyers.

Foreign Affairs Minister Penny Wong stated her belief that Israeli soldiers sexually assaulted and abused Australian women after the Gaza flotilla incident, affirming her stance to 'always believe women'.
Goldman Sachs projects a 100-fold increase in SpaceX’s AI revenue by 2030, underpinning a $1.78 trillion valuation for the company’s anticipated IPO.
Broadcom experienced a significant valuation drop of $285 billion as its revenue outlook disappointed investors, leading to a 12% share decline.
Blackstone and Partners Group are capping withdrawals from their flagship private credit funds for wealthy individuals, as redemption requests from investors have surged.
